title: salix × coerulescens
intro: Salix × coerulescens, also known as the purple willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between Salix purpurea and Salix × albo-pyramidalis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Salix × coerulescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
